standard.label: Standard Sample
standard.description: Uses the gesture descriptor mean vector directly.

mild_deviation.label: Mild Deviation
mild_deviation.description: Applies a mild offset toward the most confusable direction.

severe_deviation.label: Severe Deviation
severe_deviation.description: Applies a larger offset toward the most confusable direction.

improving_sequence.label: Improving Sequence
improving_sequence.description: Moves gradually from severe deviation toward the standard pose.
